author: Ciprian-Florin Ifrim
metric_mode: ternary branch metric with sliding eval + temp scaling
required_dataset: record-local ternary assets / custom tokenizer workflow
hardware_notes: Separate branch with custom setup, tokenizer, and script; do not treat as root-trainer-compatible
exact_command:
RUN_ID=executor_2026-03-24_74M_Ternary_UNet_FP8_10L_8192BPE_YaRN_NeoMuon_exact \

notes: Exact current-session rerun used the record-local script snapshot and local dataset/tokenizer paths.
Metric semantics were preserved from the record-local script; compare only against records with matching evaluation mode.
See the local run log for the concrete throughput and final metric lines on this host.
claimed_run_name: 73.7M Ternary U-Net — BitNet b1.58 + NeoMuon + 4x relu² MLP + FP8 QAT + Base-3 LZMA
submission_blurb: 10L 768d ternary U-Net transformer with relu² 4x MLP, factored tied embedding (254-dim), FP8 QAT, poly5 softcap, YaRN 2048, NeoMuon optimizer (3 Newton-Schulz steps), base-3+LZMA compression. Sliding eval stride=16 with temperature scaling T=0.90. 3-seed mean 1.1570 bpb (std 0.0007).
claimed_method_summary: 10L 768d ternary U-Net transformer with relu² 4x MLP, factored tied embedding (254-dim), FP8 QAT, poly5 softcap, YaRN 2048, NeoMuon optimizer (3 Newton-Schulz steps), base-3+LZMA compression. Sliding eval stride=16 with temperature scaling T=0.90. 3-seed mean 1.1570 bpb (std 0.0007).
